overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian urban fringe in Cyberpunk 2077, walking past abandoned houses and ruins under a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from paved streets to dirt wasteland with trash piles and power lines. The scene contrasts ruined residential structures with distant futuristic skyscrapers and neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street with derelict houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the ruined street observing the abandoned houses and wrecked vehicles

notable_agents.action: wrecked dark car parked in the middle of the road

entered.detail: damaged dark-colored sedan abandoned in the street
two-story residential building with weathered exterior and broken windows
tall building with large colorful digital billboards on top
massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the horizon
brown dead grass and weeds growing along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Walking down an abandoned residential street with ruined houses on the left and dry grass on the right. A wrecked car sits in the middle of the road, while a large overpass looms ahead and futuristic skyscrapers are visible in the far distance.

events.description: turns right off the main road toward the overpass underpass
enters the deep shadow of the concrete overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the dark underpass beneath the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with thick support pillars
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
gray concrete road barriers lining the path

segments.scene_description: Turning right off the street to approach the massive concrete overpass. The environment becomes darker as the camera enters the shadow of the highway, with graffiti-covered walls and concrete barriers visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path running beneath the highway overpass

events.description: emerges from under the overpass back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path beneath and then emerging from the overpass into the open

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail running alongside the overpass
scrubby dry vegetation growing along the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path directly beneath the concrete overpass, then emerging back into sunlight. The area is overgrown with dry bushes and the massive highway structure dominates the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban road with view of downtown skyline

events.description: military truck drives past from left to right on the road
turns right to leave the paved road and enter the wasteland

agents.ego_description: walking along the road observing the distant skyscrapers, then turning toward the wasteland

notable_agents.action: military truck driving past on the road heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers towering in the distance
collapsed and damaged structures along the roadside
green military vehicle driving on the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a paved road with clear views of the futuristic downtown skyline. A military truck passes by on the left. The camera then turns right, leaving the road to explore the adjacent wasteland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wasteland with trash piles and power transmission towers

events.description: enters the shadow of the overpass again while walking through the wasteland
emerges from underpass into open wasteland with large trash piles and power towers

agents.ego_description: exploring the off-road wasteland area with trash and power lines, passing under the overpass

entered.detail: abandoned green vehicle covered in rust and damage
large mounds of garbage and debris scattered across the ground
tall metal electrical pylons with multiple power lines
standing water on the ground under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Exploring a desolate wasteland area with a wrecked green car, passing back under the overpass into shadow, then emerging into an open area filled with trash piles and massive power transmission towers. The 'Red Peaks' location label appears as the camera approaches the trash heaps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate residential street into the oppressive shadow of a massive concrete overpass before emerging back into the open wasteland. It begins by moving down an abandoned road lined with ruined houses and dry grass, passing a wrecked car while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the far distance. As the camera turns right, the bright daylight fades into deep shadow, shifting the environment toward graffiti-covered walls and heavy concrete barriers beneath the highway. The scene then transitions along a dirt path under the towering structure before finally breaking back into the sunlight, where the landscape opens up into an area overgrown with dry bushes.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a paved urban road with a distant skyline into a desolate, industrial wasteland. It begins by moving along the asphalt with a futuristic downtown skyline visible in the distance as a military truck passes by on the left. As the camera turns right to leave the road, the environment shifts into a wasteland featuring a wrecked green car before the view dips into the shadow of a massive overpass. The scene then opens back into the light, expanding across an open area filled with trash piles and towering power transmission towers. Finally, the camera approaches the heaps of refuse as the Red Peaks location label appears on screen.
